prompt: A full-body anime fashion illustration of a slim young woman standing front-facing in a neutral pose against a clean light gray-white background, centered like a character design sheet. She has very long straight silver-white hair that falls past her waist, with soft layered bangs covering one eye and long side sections framing the face. The style is refined, soft-shaded, and highly polished with delicate linework, subtle fabric folds, and a modern idol-goth aesthetic. She wears a short white and pale gray ruffled dress with 8 visible black front buttons, puff short sleeves, frilled sleeve hems, frilled shoulder straps, a square neckline with a small black ribbon bow at the chest, and a layered asymmetrical skirt with multiple airy ruffle tiers. Around her neck is a frilled lace choker. At the waist is a wide black belt with a large silver circular ring buckle and 1 hanging strap ending in a metal ring. She wears 2 black fingerless gloves with frilled cuffs and silver bracelet details, 2 white thigh-high stockings, and 2 black garter straps clipped from the skirt to the stockings, one on each thigh. Her shoes are glossy black Mary Jane heels with ankle straps and small bows on the toes. Add a small dangling cross earring on the visible ear. Keep the palette mostly monochrome white, gray, black, and silver, with a soft elegant mood and a clean studio presentation.
